Class ValueOperations

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.predictiondata.ukb.renalreplacement.misc.ValueOperations
public class ValueOperations extends Object
Class for all value determination operations necessary for the applications of the model formula.
